description_long: This pumpkin is medium-sized with a classic, rounded shape and deep, well-defined vertical ridges running from the top to the base. Its surface is a vibrant orange, mottled with subtle greenish and brown speckles, giving it a natural, organic appearance. The stem is short, thick, and slightly curved, with a woody texture and a muted brownish-green color. The pumpkin's skin appears firm and slightly glossy, with a matte finish in the crevices of the ridges. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on its surface. The overall look is that of a fresh, uncarved pumpkin, suitable for display in urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A medium, round orange pumpkin with deep ridges, a short woody stem, and a natural, uncarved surface mottled with greenish speckles.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the pumpkin's stem and the symmetrical arrangement of its deep ridges.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the pronounced curvature and depth of the pumpkin's ridges, as well as the full length of the stem.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the rounded base and the convergence of the ridges, with no stem visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, but with the stem oriented in the opposite direction and more of the pumpkin's side surface visible.
